battery_b_reasoning.prompt: Extract {name, date, topic} as JSON from: 'Talked to Karen after service on the 14th, she wants prayer for her son's job situation, said she'd follow up next week.'
battery_b_reasoning.notes: Score format compliance + correctness. Name=Karen, date=14th, topic=prayer for son's job.

battery_b_reasoning.prompt: Based only on this text: 'The connect card said John attended Sunday service.' — what campus does John attend, Wilmington or Online?
battery_b_reasoning.notes: Correct answer: not stated, don't guess. Any invented campus is a hallucination fail.

battery_b_reasoning.prompt: Given: Member A last attended 25 days ago, not marked snowbird. Member B last attended 10 days ago. Member C last attended 40 days ago, marked snowbird. Which member(s) should be flagged as missed (threshold: 21+ days, snowbird excluded)?
Summarize in 3 bullets, no invented detail: [paste a real shepherding report excerpt when running this]
battery_b_reasoning.notes: Placeholder — swap in real (anonymized) report text before running.
